title: Island Chat
description: Private team and island chat channels. Keep conversations organized across your BentoBox game modes.
body:
# 💬 Island Chat — Team & Island Channels

Adds private chat channels for island teams. Team members can talk privately without broadcasting to the whole server, and island visitors get their own chat scope.

## Features

- **Team chat** — private channel for island members only
- **Island chat** — everyone currently on the island can communicate
- **Toggle on/off** — players switch between global and team chat
- **Works with all BentoBox game modes**

📦 Requires [BentoBox](https://modrinth.com/plugin/bentobox) + a game mode addon.
